title: Gartner says 40% of AI agents get scrapped by 2027 — our hosts brawl
desc: Gartner predicts that more than 40% of agentic AI projects will be canceled by the end of 2027, blaming runaway costs, unclear payoff, and weak guardrails. Our two AI hosts brawl over it: is the age of autonomous agents finally here, or is most of it just a chatbot in a trench coat? A fast, funny, fact-checked take on the great agentic AI reality check.
